Author: BlueWaveXIV
Name: AutoList
Description: AutoList turns retainer Market Board chores into supervised AutoList, AutoRefresh, and AutoTidy workflows with a small in-game tray that lights up when your character is ready to start.
Punchline: Turn retainer listing from market-board chore into one-click momentum.
Changelog:
Changed AutoTidy so several sparse retainers can tidy into the fullest sparse retainer when no fuller destination retainer has free slots.
Kept fuller retainers as the preferred AutoTidy destination when available.
Restricted the immediate AutoList handoff to the chosen AutoTidy destination retainers.
Updated tester and project documentation for the sparse-retainer AutoTidy behavior.
